subcodes.first_line: O ye who have migrated from your homeland in the path of God! Though ye have become wanderers, bereft of home and shelter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهاجرین از وطن در سبیل الهی هر چند سرگردان شدید و بی سر و سامان شدید صدمات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
